S.FORM: panmwo:Infobox person Austin Cen (lalu na theluw: Ś•ßśĖĮšłĀ; ťô≥ťüčÁŅį; ryax sa 14 na byacing tay 5 squ kawas na 1988 - squ ) hya ga squliq ka myugi ru mqwas 'tayal taywan. taywan hintgan. msqutux ka Titan(ś≥įŚĚ¶TITAN). lplpyung tay Daswesengreme mqyanux, lalu ga Áöášłä.
S.PHON: panmwo:in*oő≤ox pers~…ēon aus~…ētin ¶~ ®en (lalu na tńßeluw: ***; ***; rjax s~…ēa ** na ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēqu kawas~…ē na **** - s~…ēqu ) ńßja …£a s~…ēquliq ka mju…£i ru mqwas~…ē Ētajal tajwan. tajwan ńßint…£an. ms~…ēqutux ka titan(**titan). lplpjuŇč taj *as~…ēwes~…ēeŇčreme mqjanux, lalu …£a **.
